title: Supernova Empires to the Sky
description: A skyblock modpack with some industrial tools to make it to the sky
body:
This modpack attemps to deliver a skyblock experience with many industrial items
## Possibilities in this modpack

- Generate ores in the sky (with a specific machine or via ExNihilo)
- Generate Energy to use in some machines
- Use Mekanism machines a lot faster and stack a lot of items
- Organize your items with your favorite storage mod

## Early Development State

This modpack is in early development state so some of the ideas are not yet implemented or not in the state we want them for a stable release there will me many changes and a lot of things could break in this stage
